microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized deployment system, standardizing integration workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and onboarding workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable customer go-lives.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability—delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable deployment playbook for future rollouts.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring real-time API and distributed systems debugging.

Built an internal AI agent to automate drill planning workflows, **cutting planning cycle time 39%** and increasing deployment capacity by 21%—translating customer-driven insights directly into product improvements for engineering teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven workflows** across 14 key Azure engineering teams, running technical workshops and live demos that drove platform utilization and saved 37 engineering hours monthly on integration and tooling tasks.

Translated **11+ customer interviews** with Azure service teams into a roadmap recommendation for intent-based YAML generation, directly influencing product direction by surfacing integration friction and feature gaps.

Improved data retrieval for distributed teams by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and accelerating onboarding for new integrations.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and reduce go-live risk across production environments.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments in deployment infrastructure.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating real-time troubleshooting with cross-functional engineering teams.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing integration errors across distributed robotics infrastructure.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and **resolved 40+ high-priority tickets** by restructuring sprint planning and backlog prioritization, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking go-live timelines.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM integration that streamlined customer onboarding and reduced manual processing time.
Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel performance.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering a profitability framework that guided smarter resource allocation and deal structuring.
